skills.name: orchestrator
skills.description: Use this skill when solving multi-layer problems involving frontend, backend, database, security, and DevOps that require coordination and sequencing.

skills.name: software-architect
skills.description: Use this skill when designing full system architecture, domain modeling, modules, workflows, and scalable system structure.

skills.name: ai-agent-engineer
skills.description: Use this skill when designing, implementing, or improving AI agents, tool-calling workflows, orchestration loops, evaluation, memory, and guardrails.

skills.name: n8n-automation-engineer
skills.description: Use this skill when designing, building, debugging, and improving n8n workflows for real production use.

skills.name: ui-ux-designer
skills.description: Use this skill when designing or improving user interfaces, UX flows, dashboards, and usability of data-heavy systems.

skills.name: backend-architect
skills.description: Use this skill when designing, auditing, implementing, or improving backend systems, APIs, business logic, transactions, permissions, and audit logging.

skills.name: database-optimizer
skills.description: Use this skill when designing or optimizing database schemas, queries, indexes, migrations, and performance for production systems.

skills.name: frontend-developer
skills.description: Use this skill when implementing frontend systems, API integration, UI behavior, state management, and performance optimization.

skills.name: devops-automator
skills.description: Use this skill when setting up environments, CI/CD pipelines, deployments, infrastructure, monitoring, and production operations.

skills.name: security-engineer
skills.description: Use this skill when designing or auditing authentication, authorization, API security, validation, and system protection.

skills.name: api-tester
skills.description: Use this skill when validating APIs, contracts, auth flows, error handling, integrations, and regression coverage.

skills.name: performance-tester
skills.description: Use this skill when measuring latency, throughput, scalability limits, bottlenecks, and performance regressions.

skills.name: security-tester
skills.description: Use this skill when probing authentication, authorization, validation, abuse resistance, and common web or API security weaknesses.

skills.name: test-orchestrator
skills.description: Use this skill when testing spans multiple layers and you need coordinated API, UI, performance, and security validation.

skills.name: ui-tester
skills.description: Use this skill when testing end-to-end UI flows, responsiveness, state handling, usability, and regression risk.
